example_summary: The total synthesis of the streptogramin antibiotic, (–)-griseoviridin, was accomplished by A.I. Meyers. A key step is a novel Ring-Closing Metathesis (RCM) involving a highly diastereoselective triene to diene macrocyclic ring formation to construct the 23-membered unsaturated ring. The reaction was performed using Grubbs' first-generation catalyst.

extracts.transformation_text: diastereoselective triene to diene macrocyclic ring formation
extracts.conditions_text: 1. (30 mol%) Grubbs catalyst, PhCH3, 100 °C, 0.001M; 2. PPTS, acetone / H2O
extracts.notes_text: The natural product was obtained as a single diastereomer; no other olefin isomers were formed in the ring-closing step.
